title: Strike First Freddy
writer: Jens K. Holm, Henning Bahs, Erik Balling
actors: Morten Grunwald, Ove Sprogøe, Poul Bundgaard
plot: A sales agent of prank items, a real prankster, is returning to Denmark by ferry, when his bag is exchanged with a secret agent's bag. He ends up as a not so secret agent - bringing fun into the otherwise serious spy business.
